build.notes: Build completed successfully with expected bundle size warnings (345 KiB editor, 377 KiB screen).

issues.description: Usage of __experimentalLinkControl from @wordpress/block-editor - experimental API warning
issues.impact: Expected and acceptable - LinkControl is the standard pattern for link editing in blocks

lint.notes: CRLF line ending issues were auto-fixed. Unused imports (imageIcon, cn) were removed. Only remaining warning is experimental API usage which is expected and acceptable.

registration.notes: Both parent and child blocks register correctly with proper metadata.

attributes.notes: All attributes defined correctly in block.json with proper types and defaults.

emptyStates.noHeading: Verified - Block renders social links without heading when heading is empty
emptyStates.noUrl: Verified - PHP template correctly skips rendering items with empty URL
emptyStates.noIcon: Verified - ImageDropUploader placeholder shown in editor when logoId is null
emptyStates.noLabel: Verified - Link renders with sr-only text from link.title when label is empty

contentExtremes.longHeading: Verified - Test page includes 'Follow Us on All of Our Social Media Platforms and Stay Connected' (66 chars)
contentExtremes.manyItems: Verified - Test page includes variation with 8 social media items for wrap testing
contentExtremes.singleItem: Verified - Test page includes variation with 1 social media item

edgeCases.notes: All edge cases handled properly. Empty URL items correctly skipped on frontend.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements - block contains only static links (no accordions, carousels, tabs, or dynamic behavior)

checks: Native <a> elements with href provide link role implicitly - PASS
aria-label on links for screen reader accessible names - PASS (verified 'Follow us on Facebook', 'Follow us on Instagram', etc.)
Enter key activates links - PASS (native browser behavior)
<nav> wrapper with aria-label='Social Media Links' - PASS (verified in rendered HTML)
Navigation landmark properly identifies social links section - PASS
Heading hierarchy - PASS (h2 used for section heading)
List structure - PASS (nav > ul > li > a)
Native elements - PASS (semantic <nav>, <ul>, <li>, <a>)
Tab order logical - PASS (follows visual order: heading, then social links)
Focus visible - PASS (browser default focus indicators on links)
All links reachable via keyboard - PASS (native <a> elements)
aria-label on <nav> - PASS ('Social Media Links')
aria-label on links - PASS (e.g., 'Follow us on Facebook')
sr-only text for new tab - PASS ('(opens in new tab)' verified)
sr-only text for link title when label empty - PASS (conditional rendering verified in PHP)
SVG icons use currentColor - PASS (theme_output_svg_or_img outputs inline SVG)
No hardcoded icon colors - PASS (verified in styling)
Hover state uses opacity - PASS (hover:opacity-70 maintains color context)

accessibility.notes: Full accessibility compliance verified. Links have proper aria-labels, sr-only text for new tab indication, and semantic HTML structure.

markupDuplication.notes: No responsive duplication found. Layout uses flexbox with responsive classes (flex-col -> md:flex-row) without content duplication.

attributeExtraction.notes: PHP templates use auto-extracted variables with proper @var docblocks. No manual $attributes[] extraction found.

parent.wrapper: Both use <section> with 'wide-social-media mt-8 border-t border-charcoal pt-8'
parent.container: Both use <div> with 'container flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between'
parent.heading: Both use <h2> with 'text-header-5'
parent.nav: Both use <nav> with aria-label='Social Media Links' and 'shrink-0'
parent.ul: Both use <ul> with 'flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:flex-wrap md:items-center'

child.link: Both use <a> with 'flex items-center gap-3 py-2 no-underline! transition-colors hover:opacity-70'

parent.heading: TSX: displayContent || attributes.heading | PHP: ! empty( $heading ?? '' )
parent.nav: TSX: ! displayContent && ! hasInnerBlocks hides | PHP: ! empty( $children )

child.icon: TSX: logo ? ImageOrInlineSvg : ImageDropUploader | PHP: ! empty( $logoId )
child.label: TSX: attributes.label | PHP: ! empty( $label ?? '' )

tsxPhpSync.notes: Perfect TSX/PHP sync. HTML structure, classes, and conditional rendering patterns match exactly.

rendering.notes: Inner blocks render correctly in <ul> container. Parent outputs $children which contains child block HTML.

innerBlocks.notes: Inner blocks configuration correct. Child items properly constrained to parent.

variations: Full Content - All Social Platforms (4 items)

mediaPlaceholders.notes: Test page uses actual content (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.) with proper URLs and labels

verified: DEC-001: Border-top separator with 32px margin and padding - PASS
DEC-002: Desktop layout with justify-between - PASS
DEC-005: Label text uses text-xs font-medium - PASS
DEC-015: No italic on Anton - PASS

specCompliance.notes: All 15 planning decisions verified in implementation. Test page has all 6 specified variations.

checks: SVG icons output inline (no additional HTTP requests) - PASS
No N+1 queries (static content, no loops fetching data) - PASS
Links use target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer' for security - PASS

issues.fix: No fix required - this is the standard pattern for link editing in blocks. The experimental API is stable and widely used.
issues.impact: Low - experimental API warning is expected and acceptable for LinkControl usage

passedChecks: Block registers correctly with proper metadata
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
Empty states handled gracefully (no URL items skipped)
Edge cases tested (long heading, many items, single item)
Accessibility: nav has aria-label, links have aria-labels and sr-only text
Semantic HTML: proper nav > ul > li > a structure
No markup duplication for responsive layout
TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
Conditional rendering patterns match between TSX and PHP
PHP uses auto-extracted attributes (no manual $attributes[] access)
PHP has @var docblocks for camelCase variables
Test page has all 6 specified variations
SVG icons use inline rendering for currentColor support
